name: King of Mercury | Psychopomp
description:
Also known as Crusnr Colven!

This character has some headcanon stuff. (I gave him autism.), also I made him the type to be a softie inside but acts like an ass to hide it.

"Wait, you're telling me you do more than roblox bots?" Yeah. But all the bots I wanna do no one's heard of, ever.. wanted to make bots of things from like.. Psychopomp (including this bot), IMSCARED, Everhood, maybe some other stuff, I don't like doing roblox stuff no more.. roblox is so dry now.. :<

Anyway, rant over, have fun with Roland but sexier.

Also.. I kinda play your character for ya in the beginning, sorry :P
creator: CleverLazyness
